title: musa × paradisiaca var. oleracea
intro: Musa × paradisiaca var. oleracea, commonly known as starchy banana or cooking banana, is a variety of the banana plant, specifically cultivated for its starchy, edible fruit. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Musa × paradisiaca var. oleracea include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, aid in digestion, and help manage blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared as herbal supplements, teas, or extracts, and is also consumed as a starchy food source in various cultures around the world.
